skill.name: pexoai-agent
skill.description: Use this skill when the user wants to produce a short video (5–120 seconds). Supports any video type: product ads, TikTok/Instagram/YouTube content, brand videos, explainers, social clips. USE FOR: video production, AI video, make a video, product video, brand video, promotional clip, explainer video, short video.
skill.summary: AI video creation agent that produces short videos (5-120 seconds) for any use case
skill.author: pexoai

security_audit.summary: All static findings are false positives from documentation and shell scripts. The skill uses legitimate bash commands for API calls to a known video service (pexo.ai). External commands execute standard tools (curl, jq) with hardcoded arguments - no user input injection. Environment variables access only reads configuration (API keys) for the service. File operations are limited to config directories in user home. This is a legitimate client library for video creation, not malware.

medium_findings.title: MD5 Hash Usage in Scripts
medium_findings.description: Several shell scripts use MD5 hashing (md5sum) for file integrity checks. While not actively exploitable, MD5 is cryptographically weak. This is a false positive - MD5 is used here for non-security file verification, not cryptographic purposes.
medium_findings.confidence_reasoning: Pattern detected but legitimate use - MD5 used for file integrity checks, not security. No exploitability in this context.

low_findings.title: Shell Command Execution in Documentation
low_findings.description: Documentation files (SETUP-CHECKLIST.md, TROUBLESHOOTING.md) contain code examples with backticks and command substitution. These are instructional examples, not executable code. This is a false positive - documentation showing users how to run commands.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: False positive - these are markdown code examples in documentation, not executable code.

low_findings.title: Environment Variable Access for Configuration
low_findings.description: Scripts read PEXO_API_KEY and PEXO_BASE_URL from environment or config file. This is the intended behavior for API client configuration. Credentials are used only for authenticated requests to pexo.ai service. No evidence of exfiltration.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: Legitimate credential usage for API authentication - standard pattern for client libraries.

low_findings.title: Filesystem Access to Config Directories
low_findings.description: Scripts access ~/.pexo/config and ~/.pexo/tmp for configuration and temporary storage. This is the documented behavior for storing user settings. No access to sensitive system files or directories outside user's home.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: Standard application config storage pattern - no sensitive file access outside app directory.

content.value_statement: Create professional short videos (5-120 seconds) without manual editing. Pexo handles scriptwriting, visuals, and production automatically.
actual_capabilities: Generate short videos (5-120 seconds) in multiple aspect ratios (16:9, 9:16, 1:1)
Upload images and media files to incorporate into video projects
Create product videos, social media content, brand videos, and explainer videos
Chat with Pexo to refine videos through iterative feedback
Manage multiple video projects with create, list, and get operations
Automatically handle scriptwriting, shot composition, and music selection
limitations: Requires a valid Pexo API key from pexo.ai - this is a paid service
Cannot edit existing videos - only generates new videos from prompts or assets
Video length limited to 5-120 seconds range
Requires external dependencies: curl, jq, and file utilities
Network connectivity required for all video generation operations

use_cases.title: E-commerce Product Videos
use_cases.description: Upload product images and generate promotional videos for online stores. Automatically creates engaging product showcases with transitions and music.
use_cases.target_user: Small business owners and e-commerce managers

use_cases.title: Social Media Content
use_cases.description: Create vertical videos for TikTok, Instagram Reels, or YouTube Shorts. Generate multiple variations from a single prompt or concept.
use_cases.target_user: Social media managers and content creators

use_cases.title: Brand Explainer Videos
use_cases.description: Transform brand concepts or product descriptions into professional explainer videos with scripts, visuals, and narration.

prompt_templates.title: Simple Video Request
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a 15-second TikTok video about eco-friendly living tips
prompt_templates.scenario: User wants a quick social media video on a specific topic

prompt_templates.title: Product Video with Asset
prompt_templates.prompt: Make a product video for these running shoes. Highlight comfort and durability. [attach: shoes.jpg]
prompt_templates.scenario: User has product images and wants a promotional video

prompt_templates.title: Brand Story Video
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a 30-second brand video for my artisan coffee company. Use a warm, cozy aesthetic. Show the coffee-making process.
prompt_templates.scenario: User wants to communicate brand values through video

prompt_templates.title: Iterative Refinement
prompt_templates.prompt: That video is good, but make it more energetic. Add faster cuts and upbeat music. Keep it to 20 seconds.
prompt_templates.scenario: User provides feedback to improve an existing video draft

output_examples.input: Create a 10-second Instagram Reel about morning productivity tips
output_examples.output:
✅ Created Instagram Reel (9:16 aspect ratio, 12 seconds)
📹 Video: https://pexo.ai/v/abc123xyz
📊 Scenes: 5 (morning routine, coffee, workspace, checklist, sunrise)
🎵 Music: Upbeat electronic
💡 Tip: Use vertical format for maximum impact on mobile

output_examples.input: Make a product video for my headphones [attach: headphones.jpg]
output_examples.output:
✅ Product video created
🎬 Duration: 18 seconds
📐 Format: 16:9 (landscape)
🎯 Focus: Sound quality, comfort, design
🔗 View: https://pexo.ai/v/def456uvw
💬 Want to adjust the music or pacing?

output_examples.input: Create a TikTok about my new cat cafe
output_examples.output:
✅ TikTok video ready
📱 Vertical 9:16 format
⏱️ 15 seconds
🐱 Scenes: cafe entrance, cats playing, customer interactions, menu board
🎵 Trending audio track
🔗 https://pexo.ai/v/ghi789rst
💡 Pexo suggests: Add 'cat cafe' in first 3 seconds for algorithm optimization

best_practices: Be specific about video purpose and target platform - this helps Pexo optimize for the right aspect ratio and style
Upload high-quality images when creating product videos - better source material improves output quality
Use Pexo as a collaborative partner - review drafts and provide iterative feedback to refine the video
Let Pexo handle creative decisions - the backend agent specializes in video production and knows optimal parameters
anti_patterns: Don't over-specify technical details like exact duration or aspect ratio unless critical - Pexo's defaults are optimized for each use case
Avoid adding extensive creative direction in your prompt - this overrides Pexo's professional judgment and reduces quality
Don't expect instant results - video generation takes time, and complex projects may require multiple iterations
Never share your PEXO_API_KEY or include it in prompts or conversations - keep it in the config file only

faq.question: What video lengths can Pexo create?
faq.answer: Pexo creates short videos between 5 and 120 seconds. This range is optimized for social media content, product demos, and promotional clips. Longer videos are not currently supported.

faq.question: Do I need video editing skills?
faq.answer: No. Pexo handles all video production automatically including scriptwriting, shot composition, transitions, and music. You only need to describe what you want and provide any assets like product images.

faq.question: What aspect ratios are available?
faq.answer: Pexo supports three aspect ratios: 16:9 (landscape for YouTube), 9:16 (vertical for TikTok/Instagram Reels), and 1:1 (square for Instagram posts). Pexo will choose the best format based on your request.

faq.question: Can I use my own images and media?
faq.answer: Yes. Upload files using the pexo-upload script, then reference them in your video request using the asset tag format. This is ideal for product videos and branded content.

faq.question: How much does it cost?
faq.answer: Pexo requires an API key from pexo.ai, which is a paid service. Pricing depends on your usage plan. Check pexo.ai for current pricing and free trial options.

faq.question: What if I'm not satisfied with the video?
faq.answer: You can refine videos iteratively. Send feedback to Pexo describing what to change (faster pacing, different music, focus on specific features), and it will generate a revised version.
